title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Gati - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Gati - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Gati family as a Distribution Manager in Navi Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Gati:
Gati is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gati!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
